reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
원래 노란색 이제품을 너~~~무 만족하면서 쓰고있었는데 오래써도 튼튼하고 고장없었는데 때가 많이 타서 한번 교체해볼까~하고 다른색상으로 구매해봤어요! 그사이에 줄에 물결무늬처럼 미끄럼방지하는 느낌의 특수처리가 되어 업그레이드 되었네요!! 비가오나 눈이오나 나가야하는 실외배변견인데 크로스 핸즈프리가 되면서 딱 길이가 적절하고 방수가 완벽하면서도 고리등등이 너무 튼튼한데 디자인이 너무 이쁘고 실용성이 있는 줄은 아무리 아무리 찾아봐도 정말 바잇미 이 제품 뿐입니다! 중형견이 쓰기에 아주 튼튼하고 줄길이도 어깨통한크로스로 맨다고 가정하면 (겨울에 패딩같은 두께감 있는 외투를 입고) 저랑 강아지 사이에 중간 부분 항상 가볍게 한번 잡아주고 다니다가 비상시에 컨트롤만 살짝 살짝해주고 풀이 넓은 곳에가서는 그냥 그 손만 놔주면 
비교적 자유롭게 활동하고 배변하기 아주 편리한 길이에요! 수많은핸즈즈프리 줄 다 구매해서 써봤는데 이거보다 더 짧으면(=2m) 어깨크로스로맸을때 짧아서 배변시 불편하고 또 이거보다 더 길면(3m) 너무길어서 중간을 잡고다녀도 유사시 땅에 끄여서 불편했어요 정말 완벽한 길이감이라고 생각합니다. 똥봉투 거는곳도 완벽한 곳에 있다고 생각해요! 주위에 강아지 키우는 분있으면 걍 아묻따 이 바잇미 리드줄이라고 생각해서 추천하고 싶어요. 정리하자면 최고장점 (어깨크로스 가능한 핸즈프리 길이감 아주 적절(허리크로스 줄도 다른제품 써봤으나 어깨크로스가 최고로 안전하고 편함) 아주 튼튼한 자재. 모든 부분의 방수감 완벽 으로 장점이 하나로 꼽을 수 없고 최소 이렇게 세가지입니다. 끝까지 단종없이 영원히 판매해주세요.. 😍
reviews.content_en: I was originally very satisfied with the yellow version of this product and used it for a long time without any issues or damage. But since it was picking up a lot of dirt, I thought I'd try replacing it with a different color! In the meantime, the leash got upgraded with a special wavy texture on the cord that gives it a non-slip feel!! My pup needs to go outside for potty breaks whether it's raining or snowing, and with the cross hands-free design, the length is just perfect. The waterproofing is flawless and all the rings and hardware are super durable, plus the design is gorgeous and practical - I honestly can't find another BITE ME product like this one no matter how hard I look! It's very sturdy for a medium-sized dog, and if you assume wearing it cross-body over your shoulder (with a thick winter coat like padding), I can hold the middle part lightly between me and my pup, do slight control adjustments in emergencies, and then just let go in open fields for relatively free movement and very convenient potty time. I've bought and tried tons of hands-free leashes, but anything shorter than this (=2m) feels too short when worn cross-body for comfortable pottying, and anything longer (3m) is too long - even holding the middle part, it drags on the ground in emergencies which is inconvenient. I really think this is the perfect length. The poop bag holder is also in the perfect spot! Whenever I meet someone with a dog, I just recommend the BITE ME leash without thinking twice. To sum up, the best advantages are: (1) hands-free length that's perfect for cross-body wear over the shoulder (I've tried waist-cross leashes from other brands, but cross-body shoulder wear is safest and most convenient), (2) very durable material, and (3) perfect waterproofing in every part - there are at least these three advantages that can't be narrowed down to just one. Please keep selling this forever without discontinuing it.. 😍

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content:
우선 색이 컬러풀해서 넘 이뻐요
촉감은 딱 실리콘재잘 느낌이구요 무게는 생각햇던것보다는 가벼운편이었어요 좀 많이 무거울줄 알았었는데 ㅎㅎ
그런데 목줄을 처음 써봐서 그런지 강아지다 엄청 불편해하고 저도 어색하네요ㅠ 하네스가 익숙해져서 오히려 목줄은 불편.. 괜히 목줄로샀다하고 살짝 후회중..
reviews.content_en: First of all, the colors are so vibrant and pretty 💕 The silicone texture feels just right, and it's lighter than I expected. I thought it might be quite heavy haha. But since it's my first time using a collar, my pup is super uncomfortable with it and I feel awkward too ㅠ Since we got used to the harness, the collar actually feels inconvenient.. I'm kind of regretting buying a collar instead ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
실외배변하는 애기라 비옷에 하네스는 준비 과정도 번거로우니깐 목줄 부터 샀어요
간편한 준비로 만족하고 리쉬도 구매했습니다
무게는 30그램 더 나가도 안전을 위해 m으로 구매 길이가 있다보니 무게가 좀 체감 되지만 전 만족해요
가격만 할인해쥬면 좋은데 ㅠㅠ 
배송은 지방으로 주문한 밤으로부터 다담날 오전 도착해서 낫베드
악세사리를 달다보니 엑쏘 하네스도 출시되면 좋겠네요
reviews.content_en: Since my pup does outdoor potty breaks, dealing with rain gear and a harness prep is a hassle, so I bought a collar first. I'm satisfied with the convenient setup and also purchased the leash. The weight is 30 grams heavier, but I bought the M size for safety, and while the weight is noticeable due to the length, I'm satisfied. The only thing I wish is the price had a discount ㅠㅠ The shipping was great - I ordered at night and it arrived the next morning even though I'm in a rural area! Since I'm adding accessories, I'd love it if an EXSO harness comes out too.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 예전에 산것도 튼튼하니 진짜 오래썼는데 새로나온건 손시린요즘 허리에 차고 산책하기 넘좋아요 길이도 적당하니 m사이즈 했는데 넘이쁘네요 이것도 오래오래 잘써볼께요 예전꺼랑 비교샷
reviews.content_en: The older one I bought is durable so I used it for a really long time, and the new one is perfect for wearing around my waist on walks when my hands get cold these days! The length is just right so I went with M size, and it looks so pretty 😍 I'll use this one well for a long time too. Here's a comparison photo with the old one.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 줄이 너무 보들보들해요~ 그래서 잘 늘어나면 어쩌나 했는데 그렇지도 않네요! 가볍구 아쥬 좋습니다!
reviews.content_en: The leash feels so soft! I was worried it might stretch a lot because of that, but it doesn't! It's light and really great!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
마카롱 리드줄을 쓰고 있어서 편리함을 경험했기에 하나 더 구매를 하였습니다 핸즈프리에 고탄력감 그리고 핸들링때 미끌림 없음이 큰장점입니다
전에꺼는 세탁을 하고 오늘은 새것 장착하고 산책갑니다
reviews.content_en: I was already using the Macaron leash and experienced how convenient it is, so I bought one more. The hands-free feature with high elasticity and no slipping when handling are big advantages. I'll wash the old one and take a walk with the new one today.

reviews.name: 우****
reviews.content:
워터프루프라 활동량 많은 우리 얘한테 딱일듯 해서 
구매했어요! 배색 컬러감에 반해서 다른 목줄은 눈도 안가더라구요 ㅋㅋㅋ 너무 귀엽고 이뻐용 , 버클도 체결소리가 딱 단단한게 풀릴위험 없이 잘 사용할것 같아요! 
핸즈프리라 편할것 같은데 우리 애는 천방지축이라 어깨에 걸었다간 제 앞니가 나갈것 같아요 ㅎㅎ ... 
무튼 너무 이쁜 목줄이라 주변 애견인한테 추천해쥬고싶어용
reviews.content_en: It's waterproof so it seemed perfect for my active pup, so I bought it! I fell for the contrasting color combination and can't even look at other leashes anymore lol It's so cute and pretty! The buckle closure sound is solid and secure - no risk of it coming undone! The hands-free feature seems convenient, but my pup is such a wild child that if I put it over my shoulder, I feel like I might lose my front teeth hehe... Anyway, it's such a pretty collar that I want to recommend it to dog owners around me!

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
방수도 되고 허리에 매고다니니까 손도자유롭고 넘 좋습니다!
기존에 있는 목줄이랑 스트랩이 넘 길어서 가슴아래쯤에 매어도 162cm여자키에는 조금 땅에 끌렸는데 이건 길이가 딱 좋아요 ㅎㅎ
꼬미는 목둘레22cm라 s샀는데 잘 맞습니다
reviews.content_en: It's waterproof and since I wear it around my waist, my hands are free and it's so convenient! My existing collar and strap were so long that even wearing it around my chest it dragged on the ground a bit for someone my height (162cm), but this one's length is just right haha My Kkommi has a 22cm neck circumference so I got S size and it fits well!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
넘 귀엽고 가벼워서 좋아요🩵
색깔도 시원상큼한 파랑이라
여름에 착용하기 넘 좋습니당💕
reviews.content_en: It's so cute and lightweight, I love it 🩵 The color is a bright, fresh blue too, so it's perfect for wearing in the summer 💕

reviews.name: 앵****
reviews.content:
작년부터 고민했는데 사길 잘한거 같아요 
몇주째 비가오니까 잘쓰고있고 오염이나 냄새 안나서 좋아요
튼튼한데 대신 무거운 편이고 버클이 큰편이라 그런지 끼울때 소리가 너무 커서 강아지가 경기해요;;;;
좀 크게해서 목에 씌워쓰고있어요ㅜㅜ
reviews.content_en: I've been thinking about it since last year and I'm glad I bought it. It's been raining for weeks and I'm using it well - I love that there's no dirt buildup or smell. It's durable but kind of heavy, and the buckle is big so the sound when putting it on is so loud that my pup has seizures;;;; I'm wearing it a bit looser over the neck now ㅜㅜ

reviews.name: 경****
reviews.content:
너무너무 예뻤는데 이제 한 네번 썼나 목줄만 잃어버렸어요 ㅎ 
예뻐서 다시 구매할 거예요
근데 아쉬운 점은 계절을 잘못 선택한 것 같아요 핸즈프리라 요즘 같이 추운 날 주머니 손 넣고 쓰기 너무 좋긴한데 재질이 천이 아니고 차가워지는? 소재라 밖에서 만지고 싶지 않아요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 여름에 살 걸 또 생각보다 먼지가 잘 붙어서 산책 다녀오고 물티슈로 슥 닦으면 때가 때가 엄청나요 
그래도 핸즈프리라는 점과 디자인에서 점수 다 드렸어요
reviews.content_en: It's so pretty, but I've only used it about four times and lost the leash ㅎ I'm going to buy it again because it's so cute. The downside is I think I picked the wrong season. Since it's hands-free, it's super convenient to use on cold days like now by putting your hands in your pockets, but the material isn't fabric—it's this cold material?—so I don't want to touch it outside ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ I wish I'd bought it in summer instead. Plus, dust sticks to it more than expected, so after a walk when I wipe it with a wet wipe, the dirt is seriously everywhere. Still, I gave it full marks for being hands-free and the design!

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
비오는날 나가서놀때 일반줄은 씻어도냄새가나고 
말려도안되고해서 편하게놀고싶어서 구매했는데 
색상도너무이쁘고 저희집 댕댕이랑 잘어울리는거같아요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: On rainy days when we go out to play, regular leashes smell even after washing and won't dry properly, so I bought this because I wanted to play comfortably. The color is so pretty and it looks like it matches our pup really well! ㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
울집 닥스 둘!
리드줄이 오래되고 낡아서 불편 했는뎅
편해졌어요
색상이 새련되 보이고요^^
이뻐요 만족 합니다.
reviews.content_en: We have two dachshunds! The leash was old and worn out, which was inconvenient, but now it's so much better! The color looks stylish too^^ I love it and I'm satisfied.

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
컬러도 이쁘고  디자인도 너~무 마음에 들어요
우리집 털복숭이  수영장갈때 최고예요
reviews.content_en: The color is pretty and the design is SO much to my liking! It's the best when our furry friend goes to the swimming pool!

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
제주도에는 비가 자주오고 가끔 바다 수영도 자주해서 방수되는 목줄로 구매했어요! 근데 마음에 들긴하지만 제가 사용하기에는 끈이 많이길어요ㅜ
어깨에 크로스로 매도 살짝길어서 고민중이예요.
그거외에는 만족해요.
reviews.content_en: It rains a lot in Jeju, and I go swimming in the ocean pretty often, so I bought this waterproof leash! But while I like it, the strap is a bit too long for me to useㅜ Even wearing it crosswise over my shoulder, it's still a little long, so I'm thinking about it. Other than that, I'm satisfied.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 방수재질이라서 너무 좋아요! 줄이 길어서 너무 편해요
reviews.content_en: I love it because it's waterproof material! The leash is long so it's super convenient!

reviews.name: 차****
reviews.content: 일단 색감 미쳣따리..너무 편해요..산책이 훨씬 수월해져서 좋았어요..저희강아지 이제 135일차..아직 산책 많이 서툴지만..무럭무럭 열심히 성장할듯!
reviews.content_en: First of all, the color is insane.. I'm so comfortable.. walks are so much smoother now.. our puppy is on day 135 now.. they're still not great at walking yet.. but they seem to be growing steadily!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
여름에 하네스는 더워서
방수되는 목줄로 선택했어요
목줄 생각보다 무게가 좀 나가는것 같지만 나름 만족합니당
reviews.content_en: Since harnesses are too hot in summer, I chose a waterproof leash instead. The leash is a bit heavier than I expected, but I'm pretty satisfied.

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
매번 사야지, 사야지 하면서 미루다가 이제서야 구매했습니다. 
왜 이제서야 구매를 했을까요!
바닥에 질질 끌려도 세탁 걱정이 없어서 너무 편합니다. 
세일 할 때 다른 컬러도 구매할걸 그랬어요.
reviews.content_en: I kept putting it off, thinking I should buy it, but I finally bought it now. Why didn't I buy it sooner! Since it's waterproof, I don't have to worry about washing even if it gets dragged on the ground—it's so convenient. I wish I'd bought other colors during the sale.

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 핸즈프리라서 너무 편해요 !  조금 많이 더러워졌지만 .. 색이 예뻐요!! 감사합니다
reviews.content_en: It's so convenient because it's hands-free! It got a bit dirty though.. but the color is pretty!! Thank you!

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content:
배송도 빠르고 튼튼하고 좋아요 
방수되서 물놀이 할때도 잘써요
reviews.content_en: Shipping was fast and it's sturdy and great! It's waterproof so it works well for water play too.

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
바잇미 첫구매 찬스로 샀는데
좋아요! 목둘레 고민하다 L 헸는데 좋아요!
아쿠아픽이라 편하고 끈이 길어서 제몸에 둘러서 산책하기 좋네요
reviews.content_en: I bought it as my first BITE ME purchase and I love it! I was worried about the neck size so I got a L and it's perfect! Since it's AQUA PICK, it's convenient and the strap is long enough that I can wrap it around myself for walks.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 선물하려고 주문했어요.받아보니실물이진짜더이쁘네요.저희집애기꺼도주문해야겠어요.ㅎㅎ선물로주기만하면 안될꺼같아요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I ordered it as a gift. When I received it, the actual product is even prettier than I expected! I think I need to order one for my own pet too. haha I don't think just giving it as a gift will be enough. haha

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content: 생각보다 무게가 나가지만 색감이뿌고 고리도 안정적이라 맘에 들어요! 10.8kg인 저희아이에겐 목줄이 좀 두껍나 싶긴하지만.. 괜찮은거 같아요!
reviews.content_en: It's heavier than I thought but I love the color and the rings are sturdy! For my 10.8kg pup, the leash might be a bit thick... but it seems okay!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
배송 받자마자 줄 바꿔 나왔어요 
줄이 젖지 않으니 찝찝하지 않고 편하네용
reviews.content_en: The strap came off right after I received it. Since the strap doesn't get wet, it's not uncomfortable and very convenient.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: ㅎㅎ 색상 이쁘다규 산책할때마다 어디꺼냐 물어보는거같아오
reviews.content_en: haha The color is so pretty, people keep asking whose it is every time I go on a walk.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 항상 잘 쓰고 있어요 비가오나 눈이오나 워터프루프라 진흙탕에 지렁이댄스 춰도 젖지않고 물티슈로 닦기만 해도 되니까 좋습니다^^...
reviews.content_en: I've been using it all the time and it's great! Rain or snow, it's waterproof so even if my pup does the 'muddy wiggle dance,' it doesn't get wet and I just need to wipe it with a wet wipe. Love it ^^

reviews.name: 고****
reviews.content:
매년 여름 우중 산책하고 오면 리드줄 더러워지고 빨아도 얼룩 남았는데 
올여름엔 드디어 방수줄을 구매했습니다 핸즈프리라 좋고 생각보다 튼튼할거같네요 다만 바잇미 로고 찍힌 동그란부분이 끈적끈적거려서 닦았는데도 끈끈해요 쓰는데는 지장없을가같아 교환안해요
reviews.content_en: Every summer after a rainy walk, the leash would get dirty and leave stains even after washing. Finally bought a waterproof leash this summer! It's great as a hands-free option and it seems sturdier than I thought. The only thing is the round part with the BITE ME logo is sticky and stays sticky even after wiping, but it doesn't affect using it so I'm not exchanging it.

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content: 색상 너무~~~이쁘네요^^/
reviews.content_en: The color is so~~~pretty^^/

reviews.name: 성****
reviews.content: 너무 좋아요 이뻐요~~
reviews.content_en: I love it, it's so pretty~~

reviews.name: L****
reviews.content: 정말 약해요! 원래 러프웨어 사용하는데 여름엔 방수줄이 필요해 색깔이 예뻐서 바잇미 구매했어요. 20키로 초반인데 목줄 잠금 두번 풀렸어요. 처음엔 잘못 착용해줬나? 하고 말았는데 두번째 풀렸을 때 겁나서 버렸고 나머지 하나는 잠그다 부러짐.. 횡단보도 앞이었음.. 줄은 무거운데 그렇다고 튼튼한거 같지 않아요. 강아지가 줄로 터그 하길 좋아해서 리드줄이 많은데 몇번 물고 씹었다고 이렇게 끊어진적은 처음이네여.. 다른분 글 보니까 똑같이 끊어졌네요..
reviews.content_en: It's really weak! I usually use RUFF WEAR, but I needed a waterproof leash for summer, so I bought BITE ME because the color was pretty. My dog is just over 20kg, and the leash lock came undone twice. At first I thought maybe I didn't put it on correctly, but when it came undone the second time I got scared and threw it away, and the other one broke while I was fastening it... it was right in front of a crosswalk.. The leash is heavy but doesn't seem sturdy either. My dog loves to tug on the leash, so I have a lot of leads, but this is the first time one has broken like this from biting and chewing a few times.. I saw other people's posts and theirs broke the same way..

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content: 무게가 좀 무겁기는 한데 그래도 방수여서 사용하기 좋을 것 같아요.
reviews.content_en: It's a bit heavy, but since it's waterproof, it seems like it'll be good to use.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
마땅히 좋은 줄을 못찾아서 세트로 세일할 때 구매했어요!
핸즈프리 리드줄을 찾다가 아주 좋게 겟 했어요!!
reviews.content_en: I couldn't find a decent leash anywhere, so I bought it when it was on sale as a set! I was looking for a hands-free lead and got a really good one!!

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 어이쿠 색상 참 이쁜데 몸에 감아도 줄이 엄청 길어요 ㅠ  몸이 아주 거대하게 뚱뚱하거나 키가 많이 크거나 하면 모를까 저는(키163) 몸에 감아도 강아지가 저 멀리 가지 않는이상 줄이 땅에 질질 끌리네요. 그래서 한손으로 끈을 잡아야해요. 안그럼 강쥐 찾길까지 뻗어나갈듯요. 핸즈프리 산건데 그게 무의미해졌어요.  2미터 짜리가 있음 좋겠어요. 아마 저처럼 줄이 길다고 하신분들 많을거에요~
reviews.content_en: Oh, the color is really pretty, but the leash is super long even when wrapped around my body ㅠ Unless my dog is extremely overweight or very tall, I'm not (5'4"), so even when I wrap it around myself, the leash drags on the ground unless my pup goes far away. So I have to hold the leash in one hand. Otherwise it'll keep stretching out looking for my dog. I bought this for hands-free use but that's become pointless. I wish there was a 2-meter version. I'm sure there are a lot of people like me who think the leash is too long~

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content:
장마철에 쓰려고 구매했는데
평소에도 잘 써요
쨍 하니 눈에 잘 보여서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I bought it to use during the rainy season but I use it all the time too. It's really bright and easy to see, so that's nice!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무 작은 강아지라 클까봐 걱정했는데 괜찮아요
reviews.content_en: I was worried it might be too big for such a small dog, but it's fine.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 비올 때 쓰려고 샀어요 유용하게 쓸 것 같아요
reviews.content_en: I bought it to use when it rains. Seems like it'll be useful!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
핸즈프리 신세계입니다! 
튼튼하고 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: Hands-free is a whole new world! It's sturdy and great!

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
목줄이랑 세트로 샀어요 ㅎㅎ
실외 배변 하는 아이라 비가 오나 눈이 오나
밖을 나가야해서 워터프루프 목줄&리드줄 필수!🤍
reviews.content_en: I bought it as a set with a collar ㅎㅎ Since my pup goes potty outside, whether it's raining or snowing, we have to go out anyway, so a waterproof collar & leash is a must! 🤍

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 천보다 좀 낭창낭창해요. 줄이 길어서 어찌 자를까 고민중
reviews.content_en: It's a bit more stretchy than regular fabric. The leash is long so I'm wondering how to cut it.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
비올때 대비해서 세일하길래 구매했어요!
잘 쓰겠습니다.
reviews.content_en: I bought it because it was on sale in preparation for rainy weather! I'll use it well.

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content: 실외배변하는 아이라 눈비에 상관없이 산책하기때문에 구매했는데 색상도 쨍하니 넘 이뻐요
reviews.content_en: My pup does their business outdoors and goes on walks regardless of rain or snow, so I got this! The color is so vibrant and pretty 😊

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 목줄이 첨이라 첫날 목줄이 얼굴로 빠지는 사고가 나서 너무너무 당황했지만 좀더 꽉쪼여서 해보려구요!! 색감 넘 이쁘고 줄 길이가 여유있어 넘 좋았어요
reviews.content_en: This is my first leash and on the first day it slipped off his face, so I was really startled... but I'll try tightening it more!! The color is super pretty and the length has great flexibility, so I love it 💕

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 증말좋아요.!! 깔끔하고색도이쁩니다
reviews.content_en: I really love it!! It's clean and the color is beautiful 😍

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 색 진짜 귀여워요 ㅜㅜ 물놀이할때 좋겠어요
reviews.content_en: The color is so cute ㅜㅜ It'll be great for water play!

reviews.name: 세****
reviews.content: 비오는 날에도 걱정없이 산책할 수 있어요! 실외배변이라 무조건 나가는데, 본격 장마 시작되기전에 구입해서 잘 사용하고 있네요! 색깔도 짱짱하니 예쁩니다! *^^*
reviews.content_en: I can take walks without worry even on rainy days! Since my pup goes outside for bathroom breaks no matter what, I got this before the rainy season really started and I'm using it well! The color is so vibrant and pretty! *^^*

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 웰컴딜로 구매를 하였습니다 마카롱 방수줄을 이미 쓰고 있어서 살짝 비교가 됩니다 투명한 느낌이 더 강하고 좀 더 찐득한 느낌 색상은 말뭐 입니다
reviews.content_en: I purchased it with the welcome deal. I've already been using the Macaron waterproof leash, so I can compare a bit. This one has a more transparent feel and is a bit stickier. The color is... well, it's something.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 전에 사서 쓰다가 이제 바꿀 때가 된 것 같아서 새로 샀어요ㅎㅎ 장마철 필수 아이템입니다
reviews.content_en: I bought one before and used it, but now it's time to replace it so I got a new one ㅎㅎ It's an essential item for rainy season!

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 바닷가에서 쓸려고 삿어요. 모래뮫은거 물로 하니까 잘씻겨서 좋네용
reviews.content_en: I got this to use at the beach. The sand rinses off so well with water, so I really like it!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 촉감이 좋아요. 실리콘처럼 뻣뻣할 줄 알았는데 부드러워요.
reviews.content_en: The texture feels great. I thought it would be stiff like silicone, but it's actually soft and flexible 🙂
